risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Implementation Timelines
risk_summary: Persistent substantial political and governance risks are impacting project implementation, evidenced by repeated delays in critical agreements and the need for cautious sequencing of restructuring decisions. The project has experienced significant delays in on-lending agreement execution and restructuring approval processes.
evidence_quote: While BPE was ready to sign these agreements in May 2024 when the DISREP IPF on-lending agreements were signed, it was agreed with the Bank that it would be more cautious to wait to have the restructuring agreed and processed.

risk_title: Governance Fragility in Distribution Companies Affecting Program Execution
risk_summary: Weak governance frameworks within DISCOs are creating implementation barriers. Multiple fiduciary and governance conditions remain in-progress and are blocking on-lending agreements, indicating governance capacity constraints that could affect program delivery.
evidence_quote: Ensure existing governance and anti-corruption framework incorporate the Program... Under preparation and will be condition to sign PforR on-lending agreements with DisCos.

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints in Government Implementation Units
risk_summary: The BPE PIU (Program Implementation Unit) has not yet been constituted, creating institutional gaps in government capacity to manage the PforR component. This reflects broader governance fragility affecting implementation readiness.
evidence_quote: The BPE PIU should be constituted by January 31, 2025 (to manage the PforR of DISREP).

risk_title: Governance Risk in Internal Control Systems of DISCOs
risk_summary: DISCOs lack adequate internal control frameworks, creating fiduciary and governance risks. In-depth internal control reviews are still under preparation and are blocking program execution, indicating systemic governance weaknesses.
evidence_quote: Undergo in-depth internal control review (as part of NERC's open book review or otherwise) and establish a framework to address identified risks... Under preparation and will be condition to sign PforR on-lending agreements with DisCos.
